title: alchemilla alpina var. saxetana
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. saxetana, also known as the lady's mantle, is a plant species that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The medicinal properties of Alchemilla alpina var. saxetana lie in its ability to soothe and heal wounds, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Alchemilla alpina var. saxetana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
